name: zhiwen-skills
description: Zhiwen's personal Claude Code skills marketplace

plugins.name: tech-tutorial
plugins.description: Builds cognitive-science-aligned HTML tutorials for technical topics (Marton / Bloom / SOLO / Meyer & Land grounded). Concept-focused by default with an optional hands-on mode; scaffold structure (index + topical chapters + self-check) plus a multi-tutorial knowledge-library layer.
